query:
SELECT u.id as user_id, u.name, c.id as conquista_id, c.tipoConquistaId
FROM users u 
LEFT JOIN conquistas c ON u.id = c.corretorId
WHERE u.name LIKE '%kauan%';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2jGgPCERyrvb2fZ.e6480e658f64 --database gjgL2sFxYNbZjhUM6i4tZH --execute SELECT u.id as user_id, u.name, c.id as conquista_id, c.tipoConquistaId
